title: fix: use original folder dates for diary image URLs
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Restoring the photo albums
gist.blurb: Fixed a temporal glitch where diary images were getting lost in the wrong time zones. The build diary is back to showing off our daily pixel memories perfectly!
gist.summary: Resolved an issue where build diary images were returning 404 errors due to date shifting mismatches.
gist.impact: Users can now reliably view all historical images in the build diary without encountering broken links or infinite loading loops.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot looking at a glowing digital photo album or calendar. The robot is holding a fixed picture frame, representing the restored diary images.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head looking through a glowing digital photo album. The robot holds up a small picture frame showing a generated landscape, its square pixel eyes looking happy. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
